title: SelfSubjectReview — SelfSubjectReviewStatus
text:
SelfSubjectReviewStatus is filled by the kube-apiserver and sent back to a user.
Field
Description
userInfo
UserInfo
userInfo is a set of attributes belonging to the user making this request.
